title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入巴林：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入巴林：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Bahrain BSMD standards screening, IEC 62619:2022 / IEC 62933 evidence, UN 38.3 transport testing, EWA grid-connection and storage requirements, Bahrain Civil Defence fire-safety review, and 50 Hz site requirements versus China GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与巴林BSMD标准筛查、IEC 62619:2022 / IEC 62933证据、UN 38.3运输测试、EWA并网和储能要求、巴林民防消防安全审查和50Hz场址要求，以及中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與巴林BSMD標準篩查、IEC 62619:2022 / IEC 62933證據、UN 38.3運輸測試、EWA併網和儲能要求、巴林民防消防安全審查和50Hz場址要求，以及中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, BSMD scope determination, EWA grid-connection or storage approval, Civil Defence fire-safety approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Bahrain BSMD, EWA, Civil Defence, transport, customs, and project requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、BSMD适用范围裁定、EWA并网或储能批准、民防消防安全批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行巴林BSMD、EWA、民防、运输、海关和项目要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、BSMD適用範圍裁定、EWA併網或儲能批准、民防消防安全批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行巴林BSMD、EWA、民防、運輸、海關和項目要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Bahrain, public sources do not show one universal mandatory whole-product BESS certificate at the import level. The practical compliance route involves BSMD standards screening, IEC 62619:2022 safety evidence for lithium cells and batteries (adopted through GCC via GSO IEC 61427-2:2024 for on-grid storage), UN 38.3 transport documentation, EWA grid-connection review for storage connected to EWA's network, Bahrain Civil Defence fire-safety review for installation, and 50 Hz site configuration. China's GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 files support technical due diligence but do not replace Bahrain-specific approvals.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口巴林时，公开资料未显示在进口层面存在单一通用强制整机BESS证书。实际合规路径包括BSMD标准筛查、锂电芯和电池IEC 62619:2022安全证据（通过GCC以GSO IEC 61427-2:2024形式采用，适用于并网储能）、UN 38.3运输文件、接入EWA电网储能的EWA并网审查、安装消防安全的巴林民防审查以及50Hz场址整定。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023文件可支持技术尽调，但不能替代巴林特定批准。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口巴林時，公開資料未顯示在進口層面存在單一通用強制整機BESS證書。實際合規路徑包括BSMD標準篩查、鋰電芯和電池IEC 62619:2022安全證據（通過GCC以GSO IEC 61427-2:2024形式採用，適用於併網儲能）、UN 38.3運輸文件、接入EWA電網儲能的EWA併網審查、安裝消防安全的巴林民防審查以及50Hz場址整定。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023文件可支持技術盡調，但不能替代巴林特定批准。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, fire authority, customs, dangerous-goods authority, standards publisher, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
